name: Benchmark Research
description_en: Survey a research direction or a single paper to find and extract usable benchmarks—datasets, metrics, experiment tables/figures, baselines, and related work—into an auditable research note, with helper scripts fetching paper context and assets.
description_zh: 对一个研究方向或单篇论文做调研,找出并提取可用的基准——数据集、指标、实验表/图、baseline 与相关工作——整理成可审计的研究笔记,辅助脚本负责抓取论文上下文与素材。
long_en: Turns the tedious benchmark-hunting step of evaluation work into a structured, source-linked note instead of scattered manual notes.
long_zh: 把评测工作中繁琐的「找基准」环节,变成结构化、可溯源的笔记,而非零散的手工记录。
sec_note_en: Fetches paper context and assets from the web; verify extracted benchmark and metric claims against the original sources.
sec_note_zh: 会从网络抓取论文上下文与素材;请将提取出的基准与指标结论与原始来源核对。
